scripts.test: sh -c 'set -e; for dir in packages/*/; do echo "Testing $dir"; (cd "$dir" && yarn test) || { echo "\033[31mERROR: Tests failed for $dir\033[0m"; exit 1; }; done'
scripts.publish-alpha-patch: npx lerna publish prerelease --preid alpha --dist-tag alpha --conventional-commits
scripts.publish-alpha-breaking-minor: npx lerna publish preminor --preid alpha --dist-tag alpha --conventional-commits

hooks.pre-commit: ! grep -q '"resolutions":' ./package.json || (echo '\033[0;31mError: "resolutions" found in package.json. Remove "resolutions" to proceed with commit.\033[0m' && exit 1) && lint-staged
